seoTitle: Sync Bill.com With QuickBooks Online (Full Setup)
metaDescription: Learn how to sync Bill.com with QuickBooks Online to automate invoicing, payments, and vendor management across both platforms without duplicate entry.
intro: Running invoices and vendor payments through two disconnected systems leads to double entry and reconciliation headaches. This guide explains how to connect and sync Bill.com with QuickBooks Online so invoices, payments, and vendor data stay aligned automatically. It's written for business owners and bookkeepers who rely on Bill.com for payables and want it working seamlessly with their accounting system.

steps.heading: Set up your Bill.com account
steps.body: Make sure your Bill.com account is fully configured with vendor and customer details before connecting it to QuickBooks Online.

steps.heading: Connect Bill.com to QuickBooks Online
steps.body: Use the integration settings within Bill.com to link your account with QuickBooks Online, authorizing the connection.

steps.heading: Sync invoices and payments
steps.body: Once connected, confirm invoices, bills, and payments are flowing between both platforms without manual re-entry.

steps.heading: Set sync preferences
steps.body: Adjust settings for how often data syncs and which transaction types are included, based on your workflow needs.

steps.heading: Monitor for sync errors
steps.body: Periodically check both platforms to ensure transactions match and address any sync errors before they compound.

faq.question: Does syncing Bill.com with QuickBooks Online eliminate manual data entry?
faq.answer: For most invoices and payments, yes — the sync automates transfer of that data so you don't need to enter it twice.

faq.question: What happens if a transaction fails to sync?
faq.answer: Both platforms typically flag sync errors, which you can review and correct manually to keep records aligned.

faq.question: Is this integration suitable for small businesses?
faq.answer: Yes, it's commonly used by small and mid-sized businesses looking to streamline accounts payable workflows.

faq.question: Can I control which transactions sync automatically?
faq.answer: Yes, sync settings typically let you choose which transaction types and frequency work best for your business.
